name: SSO & Enterprise Identity
summary: Enterprise Single Sign-On supporting SAML 2.0, OIDC, Azure Active Directory, and Google Workspace. Auto-provisions users on first login. Full audit log. SAML SP metadata endpoint for IdP configuration.
endpoints: GET /v1/sso/oidc/callback — OIDC callback with token exchange
webUI: apps/web/src/app/(dashboard)/settings/sso/page.tsx — provider list, toggle enable, delete, add modal
autoProvisioning: Users auto-created on first SSO login; existing accounts matched by email
